name: investorclaw
description: Deterministic portfolio analysis and market intelligence. Ask anything in natural language through ic-engine's signed-envelope pipeline: holdings, performance, bonds, analyst consensus, news sentiment, multi-factor synthesis, portfolio optimization, CME futures, and CSV/Excel reporting. Direct file upload (CSV/XLS/XLSX/PDF) and vision extraction of broker statements. Container-first: pulls the public ic-engine image and connects over MCP-HTTP. Guardrails: educational-only, no investment advice. Free out of the box — Yahoo Finance quotes, no API key or paid SaaS required; an optional Massive key adds CME futures and premium real-time data.
